text.title: Pricing Experiment Design Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Pricing Experiment Design output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: baseline_pricing populated with a typed value
grandfather_policy populated with a typed value
cohort_segmentation populated with a typed value
mde populated with a typed value
van_westendorp_range populated with a typed value
rollback_trigger populated with a typed value
legal_review_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
